Additional Charges — Payable Separately

The following charges are not included in the hall rental and will be billed separately based on actual usage:

Electricity (EB)Rs. 30 / unit
Generator (Ganesha Mahal)Rs. 7,500 / hr
Generator (Ambica Mahal)Rs. 5,000 / hr
Guest Rooms (AC)Contact for rates
Cleaning — Half DayRs. 7,500
Cleaning — Full DayRs. 12,000
Kitchen (Ganesha Mahal)Rs. 10,000 / day
Cooking Gas (19 Kg)Rs. 2,850 / cylinder
Chair CoverRs. 30 / chair
Extra BedRs. 350 / bed
Extra TimeRs. 10,000 / hr

* GST @ 18% applicable on all additional charges. Final bill will be settled on the day of the event based on actual usage.
